title: Visualizing Eigenspaces of a Linear Transformation
description: A diagram showing how eigenvectors and their corresponding eigenspaces relate to the linear transformation, demonstrating vectors that are only scaled rather than rotated.
elements: Eigenspace E_λ₁ (set of all eigenvectors for λ₁)
Eigenspace E_λ₂ (set of all eigenvectors for λ₂)
relationships: Different eigenspaces intersect only at the zero vector
